name: Sadek Bankruptcy Law Offices
description_short: Philadelphia-area bankruptcy and foreclosure defense law firm serving Montgomery County, PA and NJ with Chapter 7, Chapter 13, and mortgage modification services.
description_long:
Sadek Bankruptcy Law Offices is a debt relief law firm headquartered in Center City, Philadelphia, with branch offices throughout the Greater Philadelphia area and New Jersey. The firm describes itself as the #1 Bankruptcy Filer in the Greater Philadelphia region and has accumulated over 750 five-star Google reviews. Their Montgomery County office is located in King of Prussia, PA, and they market a goal of having a location within 20 minutes of where clients live or work.

The firm handles Chapter 7 bankruptcy (immediate discharge of unsecured debts including credit cards, medical bills, and personal loans), Chapter 13 bankruptcy (structured repayment plans that allow clients to keep assets like a home), foreclosure defense, mortgage modification, IRS defense, student loan issues, and repossession cases. They offer free case evaluations for personal (non-business) cases and a free initial consultation with a licensed attorney via phone.

Sadek's main differentiators are accessibility and affordability. The firm operates 24/7, returns calls from lawyers and professional staff, and offers payment plans to every client with a deposit as low as $200. The initial consultation is a 15-20 minute phone call, and the firm requires any spouse or partner who shares finances to be present on that call to ensure a complete picture of the client's situation before recommending a strategy.

The firm is a solid option for individuals in Pennsylvania and New Jersey dealing with overwhelming unsecured debt or imminent foreclosure who need a high-volume, accessible law firm with flexible fee structures. However, legal fees are not published — clients receive a quote tailored to their situation only after the consultation. The free consultation excludes business cases, and services are geographically limited to PA and NJ. High review volume suggests consistent client throughput, but volume practices can vary in individual case attention.
address: 1 Mall Dr Suite 415, Cherry Hill Township, NJ 08002

company_info.headquarters: 1 Mall Dr Suite 415, Cherry Hill Township, NJ 08002

pros: Over 750 five-star Google Reviews — unusually high review count for a law firm
Free case evaluation and free initial consultation with a licensed attorney (not a paralegal)
Payment plans available to every client, with deposit as low as $200
Available 24/7 by phone — attorneys and staff return calls promptly
Multiple office locations in PA and NJ, targeting within 20 minutes of clients
Claims #1 bankruptcy filer in Greater Philadelphia area
Handles both bankruptcy and foreclosure defense under one roof
cons: Free case evaluation explicitly excludes business cases
Legal fees are not disclosed upfront — quoted only after the 15-20 minute phone consultation
Initial consultation is phone-only, limiting ability to review documents or financials in advance
Geographic coverage limited to Pennsylvania and New Jersey
Spouse or partner sharing finances is required on the initial call, which may be a barrier for some clients
best_for: PA or NJ residents overwhelmed by credit card debt, medical bills, or personal loans considering Chapter 7
Homeowners in the Greater Philadelphia area facing foreclosure or missed mortgage payments
Debtors who cannot afford large upfront legal retainers and need payment plan options
Individuals needing urgent, same-day attorney access due to foreclosure deadlines or repossession
diagnosis: Best for Pennsylvania and New Jersey residents facing personal bankruptcy or home foreclosure who need accessible, flexible legal help without large upfront retainers. The main caveat is that this is a high-volume practice — pricing is opaque until after consultation, and individual case attention may vary compared to smaller boutique firms.
services: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy (debt reorganization and repayment plan)
Free Initial Consultation with Licensed Attorney
